ddls:
CREATE TABLE "designs" (
  "design_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design submission */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the design */,
  "submitter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submitter who submitted the design */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluator who reviewed the design */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the design was submitted */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the design was evaluated */,
  "design_insight_score" INTEGER /* Score for the design insight aspect (1-7) */,
  "visual_design_score" INTEGER /* Score for the visual and information design aspect (1-7) */,
  "interaction_design_score" INTEGER /* Score for the interaction design aspect (1-7) */,
  "user_feedback_score" INTEGER /* Score for the user feedback aspect (1-7) */,
  "presentation_score" INTEGER /* Score for the presentation aspect (1-7) */,
  "overall_score" REAL /* Overall score, calculated as a weighted average of individual scores */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Detailed comments from the evaluators */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the design (e.g., submitted, evaluated, rejected) */,
  "revisions" INTEGER /* Number of revisions made to the design */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_designs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_designs_submitter_id FOREIGN KEY ("submitter_id") REFERENCES submitters ("submitter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_designs_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES evaluators ("evaluator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "project_leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project leader */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_leader_id") REFERENCES submitters ("submitter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submitters" (
  "submitter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submitter */,
  "submitter_name" TEXT /* Full name of the submitter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the submitter */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the submitter belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the submitter within the company */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the submitter */,
  "rating" REAL /* Overall rating of the submitter based on past designs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submitter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluators" (
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluator */,
  "evaluator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the evaluator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the evaluator */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization for the evaluator */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the evaluator */,
  "rating" REAL /* Overall rating of the evaluator based on past evaluations */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the evaluator (e.g., available, busy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design submission the feedback is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating (1-5) provided by the user for the evaluation process */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the feedback (e.g., design, process, usability) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, project manager, client) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the user */,
  "rating" REAL /* Overall rating of the user based on past feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
